candidate_definitions.text: PointNet and PointNet++ implemented by pytorch (pure python) and on ModelNet, ShapeNet and S3DIS.

This repo is implementation for [PointNet](http://openaccess.thecvf.com/content_cvpr_2017/papers/Qi_PointNet_Deep_Learning_CVPR_2017_paper.pdf) and [PointNet++](http://papers.nips.cc/paper/7095-pointnet-deep-hierarchical-feature-learning-on-point-sets-in-a-metric-space.pdf) in p…
